modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to submit a ticket via the USD website.

full_description_text: So, during a live chat session, I was trying to submit a ticket through the USD website, right? Everything seemed fine until I hit that submit button and bam! I got this annoying error message saying, "You do not have permission to this application." It was super frustrating because I was just trying to get some help, and now I’m stuck with this weird permission issue. I mean, come on, I thought I had access to everything I needed on the Coyote One Stop!
short_description: Unable to submit a ticket via the USD website.
